evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=11 with 900 tokens remaining should succeed (first installment unlocked)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_first_installment

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=50 with 500 tokens remaining should succeed (half vested)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_mid_vesting

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=91 with 100 tokens remaining should succeed (9 installments unlocked)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_near_end

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=25 with 800 tokens remaining should succeed (between installment boundaries)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_between_installments

evaluations.description: FullUnlock at time=101 (just after vesting period end) should succeed
evaluations.name: full_unlock_after_period_end

evaluations.description: FullUnlock at time=200 (well after vesting period end) should succeed
evaluations.name: full_unlock_well_after

evaluations.description: Validator fails when redeemer is raw integer 0 instead of constructor 0()
evaluations.name: redeemer_integer_0

evaluations.description: Validator fails when redeemer is raw integer 1 instead of constructor 1()
evaluations.name: redeemer_integer_1

evaluations.description: Validator fails when redeemer is raw integer 99 (not a valid constructor)
evaluations.name: redeemer_integer_99

evaluations.description: Validator fails when redeemer is bytestring instead of constructor
evaluations.name: redeemer_bytestring

evaluations.description: Validator fails when redeemer is list [1 2 3] instead of constructor
evaluations.name: redeemer_list

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock without beneficiary signature should fail
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_missing_signature

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with impostor signature instead of beneficiary should fail
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_wrong_signature

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with no signatures at all should fail
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_no_signatures

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=5 should fail (before firstUnlockPossibleAfter=10)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_before_first_unlock

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=10 should fail (at boundary, must be strictly after firstUnlockPossibleAfter)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_at_first_unlock

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with 0 tokens remaining in output should fail (must use FullUnlock instead)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_zero_remaining

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with output tokens equal to input (1000) should fail (no tokens actually withdrawn)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_not_decreasing

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=11 with 800 tokens remaining should fail (expected minimum 900)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_wrong_remaining_too_low

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock at time=11 with 950 tokens remaining should fail (must withdraw at least 1 installment)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_wrong_remaining_too_high

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with modified datum on continuing output should fail (datum must be preserved)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_datum_modified

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with no datum on continuing output should fail
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_datum_missing

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with two script inputs should fail (double satisfaction attack)
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_double_satisfaction

evaluations.description: FullUnlock without beneficiary signature should fail
evaluations.name: full_unlock_missing_signature

evaluations.description: FullUnlock with impostor signature instead of beneficiary should fail
evaluations.name: full_unlock_wrong_signature

evaluations.description: FullUnlock at time=50 should fail (vesting period not yet ended)
evaluations.name: full_unlock_before_period_end

evaluations.description: FullUnlock at time=100 should fail (at boundary, must be strictly after vestingPeriodEnd)
evaluations.name: full_unlock_at_period_end

evaluations.description: PartialUnlock with no lower bound (-inf) should fail; the lower bound must be finite
evaluations.name: partial_unlock_infinite_lower_bound

evaluations.description: FullUnlock with no lower bound (-inf) should fail; the lower bound must be finite
evaluations.name: full_unlock_infinite_lower_bound
